R1: Cycle | Antibody | Target | Aids to identify | Notes | In stock
R2: | PAN-CK | Epithelial cells | Tumor cells | Works well | yes
R3: | E-Cadherin | | Tumor cells | Works well | yes
R4: | CK-7 | | Tumor cells | Chose only one to identify tumor cells more specifically. CK-7 used by Färkkilä lab. SOX2, S100A10 and EGFR shown to be overexpressed in FA tumors by Webster et. al., 2022 | yes
R5: | SOX2 | | FA tumors
R6: | S100A10
R7: | EGFR
R8: | Vimentin | | Stroma | Used by Färkkilä lab, worked poorly in our smaples | yes
R9: | CD31 | | High endothelial venules in TLSs | Used by Joshi et al., 2015. Works well in our samples
R10: | PNAd | High endothelial venules in TLSs | | Not crucial, more specific identification of TLSs
R11: | CD20 | B cells | | Works well | yes
R12: | CD3 | T cells | | Works well | yes
R13: | CD4 | Helper T cells | | Works well | yes
R14: | CD8a | Effector T cells | | Works well | yes
R15: | FOXP3 | T cell function | Regulatory T cells | Worked poorly | yes
R16: | TIM3 | | Exhausted CD8+ T cells | Works well | yes
R17: | PD-1 | | Activated/Exhausted CD8+ T cells | Worked poorly | yes
R18: | LAG3 | | Activated/Cytotoxic CD8+ T cells
R19: | CD11c | Antigen presenting cells | Dendritic cells | Works well | yes
R20: | HLA-DR | | | Used by SCIMAP team
R21: | CD163 | Macrophaes | M2 macrophages | Worked moderately good | yes
